---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Privilege Row and Legislative Setbacks"
date: 2026-07-01T05:03:54.934331+00:00
summary: "Congress moves for privilege against Rajnath Singh over Operation Sindoor, while a key women's reservation bill fails to pass in the Lok Sabha"
run_time_ist: "10:33AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:33AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Privilege motion against Defence Minister:</strong> The Congress party has moved a privilege notice against Rajnath Singh, alleging he misled the Lok Sabha regarding the details of &#x27;Operation Sindoor&#x27; and soldier casualties.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Women&#x27;s reservation bill stalls:</strong> A Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at securing women&#x27;s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lok Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election Commission adjudication:</strong> The ECI has summoned rival factions of the TMC to Delhi to resolve internal party disputes and leadership claims.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Election commissioner appointment controversy:</strong> A deepening rift within the Congress party has emerged following disputes over the appointment of the Kerala election commissioner.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election commission coordination:</strong> The Election Commission of India and various State Election Commissioners concluded a National Round Table Conference in New Delhi to discuss electoral governance.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQam56eG51WV9XVVlLMzNlcF9BTG0yS2hhM0xKQ0dsWElIMzdBbDI1NlpJbHQwMjR4R2lpTVdZYV9YZEVaOEVQU1VYanBqSlowM2UzRUxPbGszTzJCN3k5SFMxOGMxVDFjSXI1ZXZNei1MV0tSZFVVWENZajBuLUtBSEFFelhHT013VmlOR21MZHIyRTNLNzBUNENPSE56REw2VFBlYUxvdGhJRUxOQ0NN?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
</ul>
